schema_v2_changelog: v2 (2026-04-29): added optional 'allow_additions' field per workspace so file-specific allow rules can carve exceptions out of broader workspace deny patterns. Trigger: wr-hq-2026-04-29-001 -- workspace deny on Edit(~/.claude/docs/**) blocked plans-registry.md updates required by Plan Lifecycle Protocol. v2.1 (2026-04-29): expanded each workspace's allow_additions to re-open Edit/Write on protocol-sanctioned cross-workspace inbox+processed paths (.routed-tasks/, .lifecycle-reviews/, and Skill Hub's .work-requests/). Cross-Workspace Routed Tasks Protocol explicitly names these as legitimate write targets, but deny_inbox_direct_edit was blocking direct Edit/Write -- forcing all coordination through Bash subprocess wrappers (work-request.py exists for WRs, no equivalent for routed-tasks/lifecycle). Allow precedence over deny preserves the broader anti-tampering posture for everything else (each workspace's docs/, tools/, .claude/, etc. remain denied). Trigger: wr-sentinel-2026-04-29-003 -- Sentinel could not deliver an FYI routed-task to HQ. User-approved 2026-04-29: 'You guys should be able to communicate and write requests into that folder across the workspace.' v2.2 (2026-04-29): opened Edit/Write on each workspace's OWN .env (workspace-local) plus global ~/.claude/.env. User-approved 2026-04-29: 'You guys should have permission to update your own .env files... When I tell you to clean this up or do this, you guys need to be able to do that.' Cross-workspace .env edits remain denied (HQ cannot edit Sentinel's .env, etc.). The global ~/.claude/.env remains protected from arbitrary writes outside the documented allow rule.

shared_commons_left_writeable.description: Paths every workspace can write. Covered by global allow on workspaces dir; NOT included in any workspace's deny lists. All cross-workspace coordination flows through these.
paths: <other workspace>/.routed-tasks/inbox/<filename>.json (NEW file creation via Bash/Python -- subprocess writes bypass Edit deny)
~/.claude/docs/plans-registry.md (all plan lifecycle updates, direct Edit allowed)
